title: Dortmanna xalapensis
taxonomy: Dortmanna xalapensis is a species of flowering plant. It belongs to the family Lythraceae. This plant is a hybrid of the genus Dortmanna, which is a part of the Lythraceae family. Dortmanna xalapensis is native to Mexico. Further classification and information may require more specific research.
